daily.today_energy: The cosmos is giving you permission to be a little selfish with your time today. Your energy's running high—use it to reset boundaries and invest in what actually matters to you right now.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your vibe shift. Whether single or coupled, authenticity is your biggest flex today. Stop performing and start being. That's where the real connection happens.
daily.career: Your unconventional ideas are hitting different today. Trust that instinct to do things your own way. The universe rewards those brave enough to challenge the status quo.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down just slightly. Not a full stop—just a recalibration. A walk, some water, or genuinely resting your phone could shift everything. Listen to what you actually need.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about authenticity, Aquarius. The cosmos is nudging you to lean into what makes you uniquely you instead of dimming your light for anyone. Trust the weird.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, the vibe is about deeper conversations and real connections. Don't settle for surface-level energy—ask the questions that actually matter to you.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to pitch that unconventional project or voice your perspective in meetings. Your innovative take is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated—honor that by building in some grounding practices. Whether it's time outside or just sitting with your thoughts, make space for stillness.
